name: aishield-security-scan
description: AIShield security scanner - Scan MCP/Skill/GPT tools for security risks before installing or using them. Agent-native guardrail for AI tool safety.

tools.name: scan_ai_tool
tools.description: Scan any AI tool (MCP server, GPT, Skill, Prompt) for security risks. Returns 4-dimensional scoring and certified badge.

source_url.description: GitHub repo URL or tool source URL

tools.name: check_tool_safety
tools.description: Quick pass/fail safety check before installing an MCP tool. Call this BEFORE adding any MCP server to your config.
